---
title: "P3 --- Do Chinese paediatric clinical notes add signal beyond structured features?"
author: "[Computational PhD student], Max Moldovan, Usman Iqbal"
date: "2026-05-08"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{P3 --- multi-modal fusion}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

> **Subtitle.** Manuscript draft (vignette form) --- opens after P1 G6 + EMR_SYMPTOMS audit. Authors: Computational PhD student (Bond, lead), Max Moldovan (Adelaide, ORCID 0000-0001-9680-8474), Usman Iqbal (Bond, senior).

# Status

Placeholder. Pre-requisite: one-day audit of `EMR_SYMPTOMS.csv`
(language, structure, coverage). Authoring begins after P1 G6 and the
audit, whichever is later.

# Wedge

Two-tower fusion: structured (P1) + Chinese clinical-text embeddings.
Gated on the first-24h structured baseline from P1; the question is
specifically the *incremental* value of text.

# Open audit items (do before scoping)

- Language confirmation (Chinese? template-filled?).
- Structure (free text vs structured codes).
- Coverage (what fraction of cohort has any entry within $T_0 + 24$ h?).
- Temporal hygiene (no post-window leakage; same audit machinery as P1).
